title: Luminous Smoky Slovakian Buckwheat Dumplings
description: Silky buckwheat dumplings infused with smoky paprika and fresh herbs for a hearty Slovakian-inspired Whole30 meal.
instructions: Rinse 1 cup buckwheat groats until water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine rinsed buckwheat with 1 cup water, 1 tsp smoked paprika, 1 tsp smoked salt, and a pinch of pepper; bring to a boil, then simmer, covered, for 15 minutes until tender.
Drain excess water and transfer buckwheat to a bowl; let cool while whisking in 1 large egg, 1 tbsp olive oil, and minced garlic.
Stir in 1/2 tsp dried thyme, 1/2 tsp ground pepper, and chopped parsley until evenly mixed; season with additional smoked salt to taste.
Using a small spoon, shape the mixture into bite‑size dumplings, about 1.5 inches in diameter.
In a large pot, bring 4 cups water to a gentle boil, then add dumplings in batches, covering to keep water from boiling over.
Simmer dumplings for 8–10 minutes, or until they float to the surface and are cooked through.
Drain dumplings and serve hot, optionally garnished with a drizzle of olive oil or a sprinkle of fresh herbs.
